text:
The End of Evangelion

File:Harpies Flying.png|The Mass Production Evangelions after their activation
File:Harpies.png|The Mass Production Evangelions arrive to stop Asuka
File:MPE Smile.png|The Mass Production Evangelions reactivate
File:Harpies attack Eva-02 (EoE).png|The Mass Production Evangelions eviscerate Evangelion Unit-02
File:Evangelion Unit-02 Remains (EoE).png|A Mass Production Evangelion carrying the remains of Unit-02
File:MP Evas Extra Eyes.png|The Mass Production Evangelions initiate Third Impact
File:Sephirot.png|Unit-01 and the Mass Production Evangelions forming the Tree of Life
File:Mass Production Evangelion during Third Impact (EoE).png|A Mass Production Evangelion floating during the Third Impact
File:Harpy stoned (EoE).png|One of the Mass Production Evangelions petrified after the failed Instrumentality
File:Shinji strangle Asuka (EoE).png|The Mass Production Evangelions petrified after the failed Instrumentality
